threads.summary: The discussion revolves around timing accuracy when using a single ignition pickup in 1-cylinder or 2-cylinder configurations. It is noted that only sharp zero-crossings provide reliable time measurements, where the negative edge of the signal corresponds to Top Dead Center (TDC), while the positive edge occurs near Bottom Dead Center (BDC) with an uncertainty of approximately ±20 degrees.

Negative edge of the signal is at TDC
Positive edge of the signal is near BDC, variable within ±20 degrees
